roadmap:
  project_id: opentelemetry-observability
  created_at: '2026-03-16T15:05:56Z'
  total_steps: 6
  phases: 3
phases:
- id: '01'
  name: 'Foundation'
  steps:
  - id: 01-01
    name: 'Install OTEL dependencies and create function ID constants'
    description: >
      Add all @opentelemetry/* packages to package.json. Create telemetry/function-ids.ts
      with typed constants for the brain.* function ID taxonomy.
    criteria:
      - 'All 11 @opentelemetry/* packages present in package.json dependencies'
      - 'telemetry/function-ids.ts exports typed constants for all 15 function IDs'
      - 'bun install succeeds without resolution errors'
    time_estimate: '30m'
    dependencies: []
  - id: 01-02
    name: 'OTEL SDK bootstrap and graceful shutdown'
    description: >
      Create telemetry/init.ts: initialize TracerProvider, MeterProvider, LoggerProvider
      with BatchSpanProcessor and console/OTLP exporters selected by OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT.
      Export shutdownTelemetry for graceful drain. Wire initTelemetry() into start-server.ts
      before createRuntimeDependencies().
    criteria:
      - 'Console exporters active when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is unset'
      - 'OTLP HTTP exporters active when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set'
      - 'Server starts normally when OTEL SDK init fails'
      - 'initTelemetry called before Bun.serve in startup sequence'
      - 'shutdownTelemetry flushes all three providers'
    time_estimate: '1h'
    dependencies:
      - 01-01
  - id: 01-03
    name: 'OTEL logger wrapper and metric instruments'
    description: >
      Create telemetry/logger.ts with log.info/warn/error/debug backed by OTEL Logs API.
      Move serializeError from logging.ts. Create telemetry/metrics.ts with all 7 metric
      instruments (histograms + counters). Pre-init fallback to console.*.
    criteria:
      - 'log.info/warn/error/debug emit OTEL log records with correct severity'
      - 'Logs within active span inherit trace_id and span_id'
      - 'Pre-init calls fall back to console without errors'
      - 'Seven metric instruments created and exported'
    time_estimate: '1h'
    dependencies:
      - 01-02
- id: '02'
  name: 'Instrumentation'
  steps:
  - id: 02-01
    name: 'HTTP request tracing wrapper'
    description: >
      Create http/instrumentation.ts with withTracing() replacing withRequestLogging().
      Root span brain.http.request with method/route/status_code attributes. Record
      httpDuration and httpRequests metrics. Replace all withRequestLogging calls
      in start-server.ts.
    criteria:
      - 'HTTP requests create root span with method, route, status_code'
      - 'x-request-id response header preserved'
      - 'Error responses set span status ERROR and record exception'
      - 'httpDuration and httpRequests metrics recorded per request'
      - 'All withRequestLogging replaced with withTracing in start-server'
    time_estimate: '1.5h'
    dependencies:
      - 01-03
  - id: 02-02
    name: 'AI SDK experimental_telemetry on all LLM calls'
    description: >
      Create telemetry/ai-telemetry.ts with createTelemetryConfig and recordLlmMetrics/recordLlmError.
      Add experimental_telemetry config to all 16 generateObject/streamText call sites
      with appropriate function IDs. Record LLM duration, token counters, and error counters.
    criteria:
      - 'All generateObject/streamText calls include experimental_telemetry'
      - 'Each call uses a functionId from the approved taxonomy'
      - 'LLM duration and token counters recorded per call'
      - 'LLM errors increment brain.llm.errors counter'
      - 'Telemetry coexists with existing devtools middleware'
    time_estimate: '2h'
    dependencies:
      - 01-03
- id: '03'
  name: 'Migration and cleanup'
  steps:
  - id: 03-01
    name: 'Migrate all log call sites and remove Pino'
    description: >
      Replace logInfo/logWarn/logError/logDebug with log.info/warn/error/debug across
      all 64 files. Remove logging.ts (Pino config). Remove request-logging.ts.
      Remove request-context.ts. Remove log functions from observability.ts (keep
      elapsedMs, userFacingError). Remove pino from package.json.
    criteria:
      - 'Zero imports of logInfo/logWarn/logError/logDebug remain'
      - 'pino removed from package.json dependencies'
      - 'logging.ts, request-logging.ts, request-context.ts deleted'
      - 'observability.ts retains only elapsedMs and userFacingError'
      - 'Server starts and all existing tests pass'
    time_estimate: '3h'
    dependencies:
      - 02-01
      - 02-02
implementation_scope:
  source_directories:
  - app/src/server/telemetry/
  - app/src/server/http/
  - app/src/server/runtime/
  - app/src/server/chat/
  - app/src/server/extraction/
  - app/src/server/observer/
  - app/src/server/agents/observer/
  - app/src/server/behavior/
  - app/src/server/onboarding/
  - app/src/server/intent/
  - app/src/server/mcp/
  - app/src/server/learning/
  - app/src/server/descriptions/
  - app/src/server/proxy/
  - app/src/server/workspace/
  - app/src/server/streaming/
  - app/src/server/webhook/
  - app/src/server/policy/
  - app/src/server/orchestrator/
  - app/src/server/oauth/
  - app/src/server/feed/
  - app/src/server/graph/
  - app/src/server/entities/
  - app/src/server/objective/
  test_directories:
  - tests/unit/telemetry/
  - tests/acceptance/telemetry/
  excluded_patterns:
  - '*.test.ts.snap'
  - node_modules/**
validation:
  status: pending
  reviewer: marcus
  approved_at: null

roadmap:
  project_id: opentelemetry-observability
  created_at: '2026-03-16T15:05:56Z'
  total_steps: 7
  phases: 3
phases:
- id: '01'
  name: 'Foundation'
  steps:
  - id: 01-01
    name: 'Install OTEL dependencies and create function ID constants'
    description: >
      Add all @opentelemetry/* packages to package.json. Create telemetry/function-ids.ts
      with typed constants for the brain.* function ID taxonomy.
    criteria:
      - 'All 11 @opentelemetry/* packages present in package.json dependencies'
      - 'telemetry/function-ids.ts exports typed constants for all 15 function IDs'
      - 'bun install succeeds without resolution errors'
    time_estimate: '30m'
    dependencies: []
  - id: 01-02
    name: 'OTEL SDK bootstrap and graceful shutdown'
    description: >
      Create telemetry/init.ts: initialize TracerProvider, MeterProvider, LoggerProvider
      with BatchSpanProcessor and console/OTLP exporters selected by OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT.
      Export shutdownTelemetry for graceful drain. Wire initTelemetry() into start-server.ts
      before createRuntimeDependencies(). Register shutdownTelemetry on SIGTERM/SIGINT.
    criteria:
      - 'Console exporters active when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is unset'
      - 'OTLP HTTP exporters active when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set'
      - 'Server starts normally when OTEL SDK init fails'
      - 'initTelemetry called before Bun.serve in startup sequence'
      - 'shutdownTelemetry flushes all three providers'
      - 'shutdownTelemetry wired to SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers'
    time_estimate: '1h'
    dependencies:
      - 01-01
  - id: 01-03
    name: 'OTEL logger wrapper and metric instruments'
    description: >
      Create telemetry/logger.ts with log.info/warn/error/debug backed by OTEL Logs API.
      Move serializeError from logging.ts. Create telemetry/metrics.ts with all 7 metric
      instruments (histograms + counters). Pre-init fallback to console.*.
    criteria:
      - 'log.info/warn/error/debug emit OTEL log records with correct severity'
      - 'Logs within active span inherit trace_id and span_id'
      - 'Pre-init calls fall back to console without errors'
      - 'Seven metric instruments created and exported'
    time_estimate: '1h'
    dependencies:
      - 01-02
- id: '02'
  name: 'Instrumentation'
  steps:
  - id: 02-01
    name: 'HTTP request tracing wrapper'
    description: >
      Create http/instrumentation.ts with withTracing() replacing withRequestLogging().
      Root span brain.http.request with method/route/status_code attributes. Record
      httpDuration and httpRequests metrics. Replace all withRequestLogging calls
      in start-server.ts.
    criteria:
      - 'HTTP requests create root span with method, route, status_code'
      - 'x-request-id response header preserved'
      - 'Error responses set span status ERROR and record exception'
      - 'httpDuration and httpRequests metrics recorded per request'
      - 'All withRequestLogging replaced with withTracing in start-server'
    time_estimate: '1.5h'
    dependencies:
      - 01-03
  - id: 02-02
    name: 'AI SDK experimental_telemetry on all LLM calls'
    description: >
      Create telemetry/ai-telemetry.ts with createTelemetryConfig and recordLlmMetrics/recordLlmError.
      Audit shows 41 generateObject/streamText calls across 16 files. Add experimental_telemetry
      config to all call sites with appropriate function IDs. Record LLM duration, token
      counters, and error counters.
    criteria:
      - 'All generateObject/streamText calls include experimental_telemetry'
      - 'Each call uses a functionId from the approved taxonomy'
      - 'LLM duration and token counters recorded per call'
      - 'LLM errors increment brain.llm.errors counter'
      - 'Telemetry coexists with existing devtools middleware'
    time_estimate: '2h'
    dependencies:
      - 01-03
- id: '03'
  name: 'Migration and cleanup'
  steps:
  - id: 03-01
    name: 'Migrate all log call sites and remove Pino'
    description: >
      Replace logInfo/logWarn/logError/logDebug with log.info/warn/error/debug across
      all 64 files. Remove logging.ts (Pino config). Remove request-logging.ts.
      Remove request-context.ts. Remove log functions from observability.ts (keep
      elapsedMs, userFacingError). Remove pino from package.json.
    criteria:
      - 'Zero imports of logInfo/logWarn/logError/logDebug remain'
      - 'pino removed from package.json dependencies'
      - 'logging.ts, request-logging.ts, request-context.ts deleted'
      - 'observability.ts retains only elapsedMs and userFacingError'
      - 'Server starts and all existing tests pass'
    time_estimate: '3h'
    dependencies:
      - 02-01
      - 02-02

Roadmap **VALID** with 7 steps. Warnings are non-blocking. 

**Phase 1 — Roadmap: COMPLETE**

### Roadmap Summary

| Step | Name | Est. | Depends |
|------|------|------|---------|
| 01-01 | Install OTEL deps + function IDs | 30m | — |
| 01-02 | SDK bootstrap + graceful shutdown | 1h | 01-01 |
| 01-03 | Logger wrapper + metric instruments | 1h | 01-02 |
| 02-01 | HTTP request tracing wrapper | 1.5h | 01-03 |
| 02-02 | AI SDK experimental_telemetry (41 calls) | 3h | 01-03 |
| 03-01 | Migrate 409 log call sites | 2.5h | 02-01, 02-02 |
| 03-02 | Remove Pino + deprecated files | 30m | 03-01 |

Now proceeding to **Phase 2 — Execute All Steps**, starting with step 01-01. I'll dispatch the functional software crafter.

input.prompt:
<!-- DES-VALIDATION : required -->
<!-- DES-PROJECT-ID : opentelemetry-observability -->
<!-- DES-STEP-ID : 01-01 -->

# DES_METADATA
Step: 01-01
Project: opentelemetry-observability
Command: /nw:execute

# AGENT_IDENTITY
Agent: nw-functional-software-crafter

# SKILL_LOADING
Before starting TDD phases, read your skill files for methodology guidance.
Skills path: ~/.claude/skills/nw/nw-functional-software-crafter/
Always load at PREPARE: tdd-methodology.md, quality-framework.md
Load on-demand per phase as specified in your Skill Loading Strategy table.

# TASK_CONTEXT
Step: 01-01 — Install OTEL dependencies and create function ID constants

Description: Add all @opentelemetry/* packages to package.json. Create telemetry/function-ids.ts with typed constants for the brain.* function ID taxonomy.

Acceptance Criteria:
- All 11 @opentelemetry/* packages present in package.json dependencies
- telemetry/function-ids.ts exports typed constants for all 15 function IDs
- bun install succeeds without resolution errors

Files to create:
- app/src/server/telemetry/function-ids.ts

Files to modify:
- package.json (add dependencies)

Dependencies: none (first step)

Implementation notes:
- Packages to install: @opentelemetry/api, @opentelemetry/api-logs, @opentelemetry/sdk-trace-base, @opentelemetry/sdk-logs, @opentelemetry/sdk-metrics, @opentelemetry/resources, @opentelemetry/semantic-conventions, @opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-http, @opentelemetry/exporter-logs-otlp-http, @opentelemetry/exporter-metrics-otlp-http, @opentelemetry/context-async-hooks
- Function ID taxonomy (from architecture doc):
  - brain.chat-agent (chat/handler.ts streamText)
  - brain.extraction (extraction/extract-graph.ts)
  - brain.pm-agent (agents/pm/agent.ts)
  - brain.analytics-agent (agents/analytics/agent.ts)
  - brain.observer.verification (observer/llm-reasoning.ts)
  - brain.observer.synthesis (observer/llm-synthesis.ts)
  - brain.observer.learning-diagnosis (observer/learning-diagnosis.ts)
  - brain.behavior-scorer (behavior/llm-scorer.ts)
  - brain.onboarding (onboarding/onboarding-reply.ts)
  - brain.intent.authorizer (intent/authorizer.ts)
  - brain.mcp.context (mcp/mcp-route.ts)
  - brain.descriptions (descriptions/)
  - brain.orchestrator (orchestrator/)
  - brain.proxy.context-injection (proxy/)
  - brain.proxy.contradiction-detection (proxy/)
- Use `as const` for type safety, export individual constants and the union type
- Functional style: pure constants, no classes

Project conventions:
- TypeScript, functional paradigm
- Do NOT use null (use undefined via optional properties)
- Use --no-verify when committing, use -s (GPG sign)

# TDD_PHASES
Execute in order:
0. PREPARE - Load context, verify prerequisites
1. RED_ACCEPTANCE - Write failing acceptance test
2. RED_UNIT - Write failing unit test
3. GREEN - Minimal code to pass tests
   After GREEN: run FULL test suite. If all pass, proceed to COMMIT immediately.
   Never move to new task or stop without committing green code.
4. COMMIT - Stage and commit with conventional message
   Include git trailer: `Step-ID: 01-01` (required for DES verification)

# QUALITY_GATES
- All tests pass before COMMIT
- No skipped phases without blocked_by reason
- Coverage maintained or improved

# OUTCOME_RECORDING
After ACTUALLY EXECUTING each phase, record via DES CLI:

    PYTHONPATH=$HOME/.claude/lib/python python -m des.cli.log_phase \
      --project-dir docs/feature/opentelemetry-observability \
      --step-id 01-01 \
      --phase {PHASE_NAME} \
      --status EXECUTED \
      --data PASS

For SKIPPED phases:

    PYTHONPATH=$HOME/.claude/lib/python python -m des.cli.log_phase \
      --project-dir docs/feature/opentelemetry-observability \
      --step-id 01-01 \
      --phase {PHASE_NAME} \
      --status SKIPPED \
      --data "NOT_APPLICABLE: reason"

# BOUNDARY_RULES
- Only modify files listed in step's files_to_modify
- Do not load roadmap.yaml
- Do not modify execution-log.yaml structure (append only)
- NEVER write execution-log entries for phases you did not execute

# TIMEOUT_INSTRUCTION
Target: 30 turns max. If approaching limit, COMMIT current progress.
If GREEN complete (all tests pass), MUST commit before returning — even at turn limit.

Description: Add all @opentelemetry/* packages to package.json. Create telemetry/function-ids.ts with typed constants for the brain.* function ID taxonomy.

Acceptance Criteria:
- All 11 @opentelemetry/* packages present in package.json dependencies
- telemetry/function-ids.ts exports typed constants for all 15 function IDs
- bun install succeeds without resolution errors

Files to create:
- app/src/server/telemetry/function-ids.ts

Files to modify:
- package.json (add dependencies)

- Packages to install: @opentelemetry/api, @opentelemetry/api-logs, @opentelemetry/sdk-trace-base, @opentelemetry/sdk-logs, @opentelemetry/sdk-metrics, @opentelemetry/resources, @opentelemetry/semantic-conventions, @opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-http, @opentelemetry/exporter-logs-otlp-http, @opentelemetry/exporter-metrics-otlp-http, @opentelemetry/context-async-hooks
- Function ID taxonomy (from architecture doc):
  - brain.chat-agent (chat/handler.ts streamText)
  - brain.extraction (extraction/extract-graph.ts)
  - brain.pm-agent (agents/pm/agent.ts)
  - brain.analytics-agent (agents/analytics/agent.ts)
  - brain.observer.verification (observer/llm-reasoning.ts)
  - brain.observer.synthesis (observer/llm-synthesis.ts)
  - brain.observer.learning-diagnosis (observer/learning-diagnosis.ts)
  - brain.behavior-scorer (behavior/llm-scorer.ts)
  - brain.onboarding (onboarding/onboarding-reply.ts)
  - brain.intent.authorizer (intent/authorizer.ts)
  - brain.mcp.context (mcp/mcp-route.ts)
  - brain.descriptions (descriptions/)
  - brain.orchestrator (orchestrator/)
  - brain.proxy.context-injection (proxy/)
  - brain.proxy.contradiction-detection (proxy/)
- Use `as const` for type safety, export individual constants and the union type
- Functional style: pure constants, no classes

Project conventions:
- TypeScript, functional paradigm
- Do NOT use null (use undefined via optional properties)
- Use --no-verify when committing, use -s (GPG sign)

# TDD_PHASES
Execute in order:
0. PREPARE - Load context, verify prerequisites
1. RED_ACCEPTANCE - Write failing acceptance test
2. RED_UNIT - Write failing unit test
3. GREEN - Minimal code to pass tests
   After GREEN: run FULL test suite. If all pass, proceed to COMMIT immediately.
   Never move to new task or stop without committing green code.
4. COMMIT - Stage and commit with conventional message
   Include git trailer: `Step-ID: 01-01` (required for DES verification)

# QUALITY_GATES
- All tests pass before COMMIT
- No skipped phases without blocked_by reason
- Coverage maintained or improved

For SKIPPED phases:

      --step-id 01-01 \
      --phase {PHASE_NAME} \
      --status SKIPPED \
      --data "NOT_APPLICABLE: reason"

# RECORDING_INTEGRITY
Valid skip prefixes: NOT_APPLICABLE, BLOCKED_BY_DEPENDENCY, APPROVED_SKIP, CHECKPOINT_PENDING
Anti-fraud rules:
- Only record phases you actually executed
- Never fabricate test results or phase completions
- If a phase genuinely does not apply (e.g., acceptance test for a pure constants file), use SKIPPED with NOT_APPLICABLE prefix and explanation
- CLI enforces real UTC timestamps

- Do not load roadmap.yaml
- Do not modify execution-log.yaml structure (append only)
- NEVER write execution-log entries for phases you did not execute

If GREEN complete (all tests pass), MUST commit before returning — even at turn limit.

Step: 01-02 — OTEL SDK bootstrap and graceful shutdown

Description: Create telemetry/init.ts: initialize TracerProvider, MeterProvider, LoggerProvider with BatchSpanProcessor and console/OTLP exporters selected by OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT. Export shutdownTelemetry for graceful drain. Wire initTelemetry() into start-server.ts before createRuntimeDependencies(). Register shutdownTelemetry on SIGTERM/SIGINT.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Console exporters active when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is unset
- OTLP HTTP exporters active when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set
- Server starts normally when OTEL SDK init fails (no-op fallback)
- initTelemetry called before Bun.serve in startup sequence
- shutdownTelemetry flushes all three providers
- shutdownTelemetry wired to SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers

Files to create:
- app/src/server/telemetry/init.ts

Files to modify:
- app/src/server/runtime/start-server.ts (wire initTelemetry before createRuntimeDependencies, register shutdown on SIGTERM/SIGINT)

Dependencies: 01-01 (completed — function-ids.ts and OTEL packages installed)

Implementation notes:
- Runtime is Bun, NOT Node.js
- Use @opentelemetry/sdk-trace-base (NOT sdk-node or sdk-trace-node)
- Use OTLP HTTP exporters (NOT gRPC): @opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-http, @opentelemetry/exporter-logs-otlp-http, @opentelemetry/exporter-metrics-otlp-http
- Use @opentelemetry/context-async-hooks for AsyncLocalStorage context manager
- Console exporters for dev (when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is not set)
- OTLP exporters for prod (when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set)
- Resource attributes: service.name = "brain-server", service.version from package.json or env
- BatchSpanProcessor for traces, PeriodicExportingMetricReader for metrics, SimpleLogRecordProcessor or BatchLogRecordProcessor for logs
- initTelemetry() should be a pure function that reads env and returns providers
- shutdownTelemetry() should flush and shutdown all three providers
- If OTEL init fails, server must still start (graceful degradation — log to console, proceed)
- Functional style: no classes, pure functions, composition
- Read app/src/server/runtime/start-server.ts to understand current startup sequence before modifying

Project conventions:
- TypeScript, functional paradigm
- Do NOT use null (use undefined via optional properties)
- Use --no-verify when committing, use -s (GPG sign)
- Do NOT use module-level mutable singletons

**Files created:**
- `/Users/marcus/conductor/workspaces/brain-v1/jerusalem/app/src/server/telemetry/logger.ts` -- OTEL-backed logger with `log.info/warn/error/debug`, `serializeError`, `logToConsole` fallback

**Key design decisions:**
- `log.*` functions call `logs.getLogger("brain-server")` on each invocation (not cached at module level), so they pick up whichever LoggerProvider is globally registered -- no module-level mutable singleton
- `metrics.ts` uses `metrics.getMeter("brain-server")` at module level, which is safe because the OTEL API returns no-op instruments before init
- `serializeError` is exported from `logger.ts` for reuse; the full version in `logging.ts` remains untouched (migration happens in a later step)
- Console fallback resolves `console.*` at call time (not capture time) to support test mocking
